entities.name: EMASCULATION
entities.description: The process of removing anthers to prevent self-pollination

entities.description: The transfer of pollen to the stigma to achieve fertilization

entities.description: Chemical substances applied to facilitate the hybridization process

entities.description: In vitro culture of ovules to obtain hybrid plants

entities.description: The process of extracting embryos for culture to obtain hybrid plants

entities.name: ALBINISM
entities.description: A condition where plants lack chlorophyll and appear white

entities.description: Biochemical analysis used to confirm the hybrid nature of the plants

entities.description: A specific culture medium used for the growth of hybrid shoots

entities.name: IAA

entities.name: TRANSMISSION ELECTRON MICROSCOPY
entities.description: A high-resolution imaging technique used to study cellular ultrastructure

entities.description: The organization and morphology of chloroplasts, including the grana
